microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's **resilience validation framework** from a 2-person operation into a platformized governance system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining data product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and shifted execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects to establish continuous validation standards.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** spanning Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% by restructuring dependency tracking and stakeholder alignment processes.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly across Azure service orgs.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, identifying critical data pipeline feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized requirements.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval quality** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% across engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — mirroring a Data Governance Council consensus model.

Defined a data-quality roadmap by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then scoping remediation paths and aligning Engineering, Ops, and Product stakeholders.

Built a **Power BI governance dashboard** to track operational toil and data completeness across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact remediation with accuracy and confidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a sequenced rollout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, maintaining a prioritized backlog that resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilized the developer intake and data-feed dependency tracking process.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and enforcing architecture standards across all integrated systems.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping, data entry, and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a structured CRM process that improved data accuracy and stewardship across the sales lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, leveraging analytics to optimize digital channels and surface authoritative performance signals.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, translating complex data into compliance-ready pricing reports that directly improved leadership decision-making.

tailoring_notes: Wove 'data governance framework' and 'governance standards' into microsoft_ft bullets 1 and 4 to mirror the JD's 'architect the end-to-end data governance and stewardship framework' language.

Inserted 'Data Governance Council consensus model' into microsoft_2022 bullet 1 — directly referencing the JD's requirement to 'Facilitate the Data Governance Council and drive consensus on data decisions.'

Used 'data integrity,' 'metadata standards,' and 'authoritative' in microsoft_2023 bullet 3 to mirror JD language around 'critical data elements,' 'authoritative sources,' and 'data quality standards.'
Referenced 'Unity Catalog' (Databricks) and 'Snowflake' in skills to match the JD's explicit tooling requirements under Cloud Governance.
Framed amazon_robotics bullet 2 around 'data-feed dependency tracking' to connect Agile execution experience to the JD's 'data lineage' and 'resilient data feeds' responsibilities.
